description_long: This hospital complex features a large, rectangular main building with a light gray facade and a flat roof, surrounded by meticulously landscaped grounds. The front entrance is marked by a circular driveway with a central fountain, leading to a wide, paved parking lot with designated spaces, including accessible parking. The grounds are adorned with numerous trees and shrubs, and the pathways are clearly defined with pinkish paving. The building itself has multiple windows arranged in a regular pattern, and the main entrance is accentuated by a black awning or canopy. The rear of the property includes additional green space and a secondary access road. The overall layout is symmetrical and organized, reflecting a formal and institutional design.
description: A large, light gray hospital building with a flat roof, central entrance, landscaped grounds, and a prominent front fountain and parking lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway with fountain, and the full parking lot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, landscaped areas, and partial view of the parking lot and fountain.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional green space, and secondary access road.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's depth, tree-lined pathways, and the parking lot extending to the right.
